actual_run_inference: CORE-1: the finite/proxy baseline was confirmed on this run's window.
What was tested: The harmonic converter / explicit-formula reconstruction behaves covariantly across the tested gauge scales k.
This preserves the route the experiment witnesses; it does not prove the base claim or any necessary condition.

expected_signature.pass_rule: drift remains within tolerance for every tested k

baseline_hypothesis.plain_statement: The harmonic converter / explicit-formula reconstruction behaves covariantly across the tested gauge scales k.
baseline_hypothesis.why_this_matters: Reconstruction covariance is the finite-precision proxy for the same-object behavior the gauge claims. Without it, NC3 (same-case criterion) cannot be witnessed by reconstruction agreement.

candidate_lemmas.name: Finite Reconstruction Covariance Lemma
candidate_lemmas.statement: On this run's window, The harmonic converter / explicit-formula reconstruction behaves covariantly across the tested gauge scales k held within tolerance (primary metric max_drift_between_k_zero_and_other_k: observed ≈ 200). Formalizing this as a finite/proxy lemma is the next research step.
what_it_does_not_prove: this turns the proxy into a formal proof

disallowed_conclusions: this turns the proxy into a formal proof
The RH predicate transports exactly under the gauge.
Coverage extends beyond Odlyzko's verified range.
intended_inference_if_passed: the finite reconstruction-covariance proxy is consistent with same-object behavior on the tested window
this preserves the candidate route to NC3 via reconstruction agreement
no formal claim about same-object equality is established
next_hypotheses: Extend the tested window for CORE-1 to confirm robustness.
Tighten the tolerance on max_drift_between_k_zero_and_other_k and re-run.

raw_observations.verifier_interpretation: Main Riemann Converter curves are invariant under x_eff = X/tau^k on the tested grid. Reconstruction accuracy is reported separately as supporting validation, not as an RH or zero-scaling proof.

verifier_static_inference._label: static rails recorded by verifier; do not read as run conclusion
allowed_conclusion: The explicit-formula reconstruction of pi(X/tau^k) using the un-scaled zero set tracks the true prime count covariantly across the tested k-range at AUTHORITATIVE fidelity.
disallowed_conclusion: The RH predicate transports exactly under the gauge.
Coverage extends beyond Odlyzko's verified range.
verifier_static_inference.inference_scope: this run, tested k-range, AUTHORITATIVE fidelity required
